_note: Editable rate table read by scripts/video.py. transcription_per_min = USD per minute of audio. model_per_mtok = API-equivalent USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Codex subscription usage may not be billed per API token. Update as provider prices drift. Updated July 2026.

frame._comment: Frames are downscaled to this width before the agent reads them. GPT-5.6 uses ceil(w/32)*ceil(h/32) patches; Claude presets retain the legacy ceil(w*h/750) estimator.
